'''jofafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:kureef|kureef]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-f-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kureef|kureef]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jofafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jofafithi|jofafithi]] || [[word:jofafiji|jofafiji]] || [[word:jofafishi|jofafishi]] || [[word:jofafiki|jofafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jofafuthuthu|jofafuthuthu]] || [[word:jofafujuju|jofafujuju]] || [[word:jofafushushu|jofafushushu]] || [[word:jofafukuku|jofafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jofafuthu|jofafuthu]] || [[word:jofafuju|jofafuju]] || [[word:jofafushu|jofafushu]] || [[word:jofafuku|jofafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jofafufthuf|jofafufthuf]] || [[word:jofafufjuf|jofafufjuf]] || [[word:jofafufshuf|jofafufshuf]] || [[word:jofafufkuf|jofafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jofafethe|jofafethe]] || [[word:jofafeje|jofafeje]] || [[word:jofafeshe|jofafeshe]] || [[word:jofafeke|jofafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jofafothotho|jofafothotho]] || [[word:jofafojojo|jofafojojo]] || [[word:jofafoshosho|jofafoshosho]] || [[word:jofafokoko|jofafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jofafotho|jofafotho]] || [[word:jofafojo|jofafojo]] || [[word:jofafosho|jofafosho]] || [[word:jofafoko|jofafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jofafofthof|jofafofthof]] || [[word:jofafofjof|jofafofjof]] || [[word:jofafofshof|jofafofshof]] || [[word:jofafofkof|jofafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jofafÃŸfthÃŸf|jofafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jofafÃŸfjÃŸf|jofafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jofafÃŸfshÃŸf|jofafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jofafÃŸfkÃŸf|jofafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jofafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|jofafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jofafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|jofafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jofafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|jofafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jofafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|jofafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jofafÃŸfthÃŸf|jofafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jofafÃŸfjÃŸf|jofafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jofafÃŸfshÃŸf|jofafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jofafÃŸfkÃŸf|jofafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jofafÃŸfthÃŸf|jofafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jofafÃŸfjÃŸf|jofafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jofafÃŸfshÃŸf|jofafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jofafÃŸfkÃŸf|jofafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jofafÃḊthÃḊ|jofafÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:jofafÃḊjÃḊ|jofafÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:jofafÃḊshÃḊ|jofafÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:jofafÃḊkÃḊ|jofafÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jofafathatha|jofafathatha]] || [[word:jofafajaja|jofafajaja]] || [[word:jofafashasha|jofafashasha]] || [[word:jofafakaka|jofafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jofafatha|jofafatha]] || [[word:jofafaja|jofafaja]] || [[word:jofafasha|jofafasha]] || [[word:jofafaka|jofafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jofafafthaf|jofafafthaf]] || [[word:jofafafjaf|jofafafjaf]] || [[word:jofafafshaf|jofafafshaf]] || [[word:jofafafkaf|jofafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:jofafasha|jofafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:jofafshÃḋasha|jofafshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jofafroasha|jofafroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jofafmuasha|jofafmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:jofafyaasha|jofafyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojofafnkshÃḋasha|gojofafnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojofafnkroasha|gojofafnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojofafnkmuasha|gojofafnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojofafnkyaasha|gojofafnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:jofafafasha|jofafafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jofafafshÃḋasha|jofafafshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jofafafroasha|jofafafroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jofafafmuasha|jofafafmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jofafafyaasha|jofafafyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojofafafnkshÃḋasha|gojofafafnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojofafafnkroasha|gojofafafnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojofafafnkmuasha|gojofafafnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojofafafnkyaasha|gojofafafnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jefÃḊfasha|jefÃḊfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jefÃḊfshÃḋasha|jefÃḊfshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jefÃḊfroasha|jefÃḊfroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jefÃḊfmuasha|jefÃḊfmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jefÃḊfyaasha|jefÃḊfyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojefÃḊfnkshÃḋasha|gojefÃḊfnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojefÃḊfnkroasha|gojefÃḊfnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojefÃḊfnkmuasha|gojefÃḊfnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojefÃḊfnkyaasha|gojefÃḊfnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:joffafasha|joffafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:joffafshÃḋasha|joffafshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:joffafroasha|joffafroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:joffafmuasha|joffafmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:joffafyaasha|joffafyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojoffafnkshÃḋasha|gojoffafnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojoffafnkroasha|gojoffafnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojoffafnkmuasha|gojoffafnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojoffafnkyaasha|gojoffafnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
